name: causal-bank-torch-cuda-pilot-18x-routed-e8-seeded
goal: Seeded parity pilot for the current best routed causal-bank readout on CUDA after fixing the Torch seed bug.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train train-causal-bank-torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 18.0 --steps 1000 --seq-len 256 --batch-size 16 --seed 42 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --linear-readout-kind routed_sqrelu_experts --linear-readout-num-experts 8 --probe-steps 1000 --probe-eval-batches 8 --final-eval-batches 50 --device cuda --json /run/causal_bank_torch_cuda_pilot_18x_routed_e8_seed42.json

name: causal-bank-torch-cuda-pilot-18x-mlp-seeded
goal: Seeded baseline parity pilot for the plain MLP readout on CUDA so we can separate backend drift from routed-readout drift.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train train-causal-bank-torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 18.0 --steps 1000 --seq-len 256 --batch-size 16 --seed 42 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --linear-readout-kind mlp --probe-steps 1000 --probe-eval-batches 8 --final-eval-batches 50 --device cuda --json /run/causal_bank_torch_cuda_pilot_18x_mlp_seed42.json
